Python: Learn Python syntax, functions, classes, file handling, and virtual environments.
Build 2 to 3 practical projects such as an API service, a data processing script, and an automation tool.
Java: Learn OOP, collections, exception handling, multithreading, and Maven/Gradle basics.
Build a small backend or desktop project and practice clean code structure.
C: Learn core syntax, common libraries, debugging patterns, and best practices for C.

C++: Practice pointers, memory management, STL, OOP, and modern C++ features.
